sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتْ لَمَى أَنْ تَشْتَرِيَ فُسْتَانًا جَدِيدًا.
sentences.translation: Lema je htjela kupiti novu haljinu.
sentences.translationEn: Lama wanted to buy a new dress.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ إِلَى المَحَلِّ وَنَظَرَتْ فِي الأَسْعَارِ.
sentences.translation: Otišla je u prodavnicu i pogledala cijene.
sentences.translationEn: She went to the shop and looked at the prices.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ فُسْتَانًا بِسِعْرٍ مُنَاسِبٍ وَلَوْنٍ جَمِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Pronašla je haljinu po odgovarajućoj cijeni i lijepoj boji.
sentences.translationEn: She found a dress at a suitable price and beautiful color.

sentences.translation: Isprobala ga je i jako joj se svidio pa ga je kupila.
sentences.translationEn: She tried it on and liked it a lot so she bought it.

sentences.translation: Vratila se kući sretna zbog kupovine.
sentences.translationEn: She returned home happy with her purchase.
